title: SV randomize on dynamic array - error

features.name: randomize dynamic array with foreach constraint
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand dynamic array that uses foreach in a constraint block to access array elements
features.snippet: class C; rand int arr[]; constraint c { foreach(arr[i]) arr[i] == i; } endclass

features.name: dynamic array size constraint
features.description: Code should include a class with a dynamic array having a constraint on its size() method
features.snippet: class C; rand int arr[]; constraint c { arr.size() == 10; } endclass
